query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSpeedTier != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_speed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedContractMonths IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_contract,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedServiceStartDate != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_start_date,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedAvcId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_avc_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedHardwareStatus != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_hardware,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSipChannels IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_sip,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedHas4gBackup = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_4g_backup,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedAttributes IS NOT NULL AND parsedAttributes != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_any_attribute
FROM billing_items;

  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedAttributes IS NOT NULL AND parsedAttributes != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_any_attribute
FROM billing_items;
